stemHtml: What Performance Class is a multi-engined turbo-jet aeroplane with a Maximum Take-Off Mass (MTOM) of 4750 kg and Maximum Operational Passenger Seating Configuration (MOPSC) of 4 passengers?

options.a: Class A because it is a multi-engined turbo-jet aeroplane, regardless of its MTOM and MOPSC.
options.b: There is no Performance Class for turbo-jet aeroplanes with an MTOM of less than 5700 kg.
options.c: Class B because its MTOM is less than 5700 kg and its MOPSC is less than 9 passengers.
options.d: Class C because it is a turbo-jet aeroplane with an MOPSC of less than 9 passengers.
